case_title: PABLO TIMOTEO GONZALEZ et al VS. BUDSABA LISA BRANGSOMBOON M.D

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT GONZALEZ, PABLO TIMOTEO PEREZ, MARIA MAGDALENA AS TO RESPONDENT BRANGSOMBOON M.D, BUDSABA LISA HEARING SET FOR APR-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-17-2002 - CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 MR. PABLO TIMOTEO GONZALEZ IS REQUIRED TO BRING WITH HIM AT THAT TIME A SPANISH TO ENGLISH INTERPRETER, PRO TEM JUDGE SEYMOUR SEIDSCHER HAS INSTRUCTED THIS PERSON TO DO SO.
ORDER STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2002 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF 09MAY02 BY PRO TEM JUDGE SEYMOUR SEIDSCHER; CLERK: M.MANZELLA & P.DIAS; MATTER NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 525.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GONZALEZ, PABLO TIMOTEO PEREZ, MARIA MAGDALENA $3,819.44 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,839.44, POSSIBLE D.M.V.
